selected_because: high-confidence candidate with readable turn context, clear TWA/yaw transition, and persistent fleet-relative speed and absolute-VMG separation
recommended_use: Primary single-case demonstration after human approval
one_sentence_demo_story: FoilBrief flags ITA's gybe near LG2 in Bermuda Race 2 because the boat shows persistent fleet-relative speed and absolute-VMG separation after the maneuver, making the recovery phase worth coach review.
why_low_confidence_stage2_leaders_reject: Primary selection requires supported labels, baselines, and readable evidence.
